ab: no ka madagdag am. ji ko nimapis kangay ko meyvatvatek.
en: I was late for school this morning.

ab: mangay ko do gako am, nyawaw ko a ji nimapalolo so kabang.
ch: 去學校的時候，我忘了帶書包。
en: When I was going to school, I forgot to bring my backpack.

ab: ji abo nyahap ko a nipalolo.
en: I didn't bring anything with me.

ab: no kapivatvatek namen, to namen raroa a citan o asa ka vakong.
ch: 上課的時候，我和同學一起看課本。
en: During class, I and my classmates read the textbook together.

ab: no kapisikin, voodan ko o pivatvatek aka no ipangongopas do kararay ko.
ch: 考試的時候，同學借我筆和橡皮擦。
en: During the exam, a classmate lent me a pen and an eraser.

ab: koan na yaken no sinsi, “ madagdag ka mivangon, ji ka mipahahay!”
ch: 老師跟我說：「下次早點起床，不要再遲到了!」
en: The teacher told me, "Wake up earlier next time and don't be late again!"
